title: MD
biography: Richard Doll was a British epidemiologist who established the link between smoking and lung cancer in one of the most important epidemiological studies ever conducted.
aiSummary: Richard Doll is a epidemiology specialist at University of Oxford. Based in Oxford.

timeline.title: Proved smoking causes lung cancer
timeline.description: Published landmark study with Austin Bradford Hill showing the causal link between cigarette smoking and lung cancer

timeline.title: British Doctors Study
timeline.description: Launched the massive cohort study of British doctors that quantified smoking's health effects
